title: ELYSIUM : Blue Den Mansion
description:
Features• Explore a large abandoned mansion filled with secrets.

• Search for keys, notes, and important items needed to unlock new areas.

• Experience a tense atmosphere inspired by classic survival horror games

The nightmare has already begun.

Enter Blue Den Mansion... if you dare.

Об игреYour brother and his friends set out on a camping trip deep within a mysterious mountain range, inviting you to join them for what was supposed to be a fun adventure.

But on the second night of the camp, everything changes.

While heading out alone for a late-night bathroom break, you suddenly hear terrifying screams echoing through the forest, followed by a monstrous roar unlike anything human. Panicked, you rush back to the campsite—only to find it completely abandoned. The tents are torn apart, the campfire extinguished, and the ground soaked in blood. Your brother and everyone else are gone.

Driven by fear and desperation, you follow the trail of blood deeper into the dark wilderness. The trail eventually leads you to a mysterious mansion hidden within the mountains. Every door and window is tightly locked… except for a single hatch leading down into the basement.

Now trapped in a nightmare, you must explore the cursed mansion, uncover the horrifying truth behind the creature lurking within, and rescue your brother before it’s too late.
description_short: A first-person psychological horror game where you explore a mysterious mansion, solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and survive a terrifying creature lurking in the shadows.
